page.content: In Table 1, the clinical signs associated with different groups are detailed, with Group labeled as the first header followed by clinical signs: Depression, Erythema, Dyspnea, Conjunctivitis, and Emaciation. For HP-PRRSV/PCV2 (group 1), all clinical signs are present at 5/5. PCV2/HP-PRRSV (group 2) shows Depression at 2/5, Erythema at 2/5, Dyspnea at 3/5, Conjunctivitis at 4/5, and Emaciation at 4/5. HP-PRRSV+PCV2 (group 3) has Depression at 5/5, Erythema at 2/5, Dyspnea at 3/5, Conjunctivitis at 5/5, and Emaciation at 5/5. HP-PRRSV (group 4) reports Depression at 1/5, Erythema at 0/5, Dyspnea at 2/5, Conjunctivitis at 5/5, and Emaciation at 2/5. PCV2 (group 5) shows no clinical signs with all values at 0/5, while the Control (group 6) also has all values at 0/5. Table 2 presents egg ejection data, with the headers being Egg ejection, df, χ2, and p. For Egg, df is 1, χ2 is 71.15, and p is <0.001; for Dummy, df is 2, χ2 is 1.11, and p is 0.57; for E*D, df is 2, χ2 is 2.63, and p is 0.27; and for Clutch size, df is 2, χ2 is 2.10, and p is 0.15.

lines.text: In Table 1, the clinical signs associated with different groups are detailed, with Group labeled as the first header followed by
clinical signs: Depression, Erythema, Dyspnea, Conjunctivitis, and Emaciation. For HP-PRRSV/PCV2 (group 1), all clinical
signs are present at 5/5. PCV2/HP-PRRSV (group 2) shows Depression at 2/5, Erythema at 2/5, Dyspnea at 3/5, Conjunctivitis
at 4/5, and Emaciation at 4/5. HP-PRRSV+PCV2 (group 3) has Depression at 5/5, Erythema at 2/5, Dyspnea at 3/5,
Conjunctivitis at 5/5, and Emaciation at 5/5. HP-PRRSV (group 4) reports Depression at 1/5, Erythema at 0/5, Dyspnea at 2/5,
Conjunctivitis at 5/5, and Emaciation at 2/5. PCV2 (group 5) shows no clinical signs with all values at 0/5, while the Control
(group 6) also has all values at 0/5. Table 2 presents egg ejection data, with the headers being Egg ejection, df, χ2, and p. For
Egg, df is 1, χ2 is 71.15, and p is <0.001; for Dummy, df is 2, χ2 is 1.11, and p is 0.57; for E*D, df is 2, χ2 is 2.63, and p is 0.27;
and for Clutch size, df is 2, χ2 is 2.10, and p is 0.15.
